text:
Once upon a time, there was a curious cat named Whiskers. Every morning, Whiskers would wake up early, stretch, and head outside under the big moonlit sky. One evening as the sun went down, Whiskers stumbled upon a mysterious old book buried deep beneath the town garden. As he gingerly flipped through its pages, he found a spell that promised to grant a single wish.

Excited, Whiskers sat eagerly upon a cushion by the book's edge. His wish was simple yet heartfelt: to spend an entire day just playing fetch with a friendly squirrel.

The next morning, after a refreshing sleep under the moonlight, Whiskers found his wishful wish alive. That afternoon, he spotted a curious squirrel that lived in a cozy tree hollow just beyond the forest edge.

Whiskers raced across the dewy grasslands, panting with delight. He leaped into the friendly squirrel's tree hollow, scampering joyfully about chasing tiny toy mice
